tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Lonely, I'm Mr. Lonely[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I have nobody for my own[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]    
I'm so lonely, I'm Mr. Lonely[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I have nobody for my own[/tab]


[Intro]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
I'm so lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
  Yo, this one here goes out[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
To all my players out there, man[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]            
You know, that got that one good girl, dawg[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
That's always been there, man[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
Like, took all the bullshit[/tab]
                          
But then one day she can't take it no more
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
And decides to leave[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, I woke up in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
And I noticed my girl wasn't by my side[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Could've sworn I was dreamin'[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
For her I was feenin'[/tab]

So I had to take a little ride
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  Backtrackin' on these few years[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Tryin' to figure out what I do to make it go bad[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  ‘Cause ever since my girl left me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  My whole life came crashin', and I'm so…[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  
Lonely (so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                  
Oh, I'm so lonely (so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           ([ch]C[/ch])      
Oh, I'm so lonely[/tab]


[Verse]
                                   
Can't believe I had a girl like you
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                                     
And I just let you walk right out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           
  After all I put you through[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                        
You still stuck around and stayed by my side[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                         
  What really hurt me is I broke your heart[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                                  
Baby, you a good girl and I had no right[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                
  I really wanna make things right[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                                          
‘Cause without you in my life, girl, I'm so…[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  
Lonely (so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                  
Oh, I'm so lonely (so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           ([ch]C[/ch])      
Oh, I'm so lonely[/tab]


[Verse]
                        
Been all about the world
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]    
Ain't never met a girl[/tab]
                                                
That could take the things that you been through
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                 
  Never thought the day would come[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]   
Where you would get up and run[/tab]
                              
And I would be out chasin' you
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                 
  ‘Cause ain't nowhere in the globe I'd rather be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                        
  Ain't no one in the globe I'd rather see[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                          
  Than the girl of my dreams that made me be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           
  So happy, but now so lonely[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  
Lonely (so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                  
Oh, I'm so lonely (so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           ([ch]C[/ch])      
Oh, I'm so lonely[/tab]


[Verse 4]
                               
Never thought that I'd be alone
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                      
  I didn't think you'd be gone this long[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                
  I just want you to call my phone[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    N.C.                                   
  So stop playin', girl, and come on home[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 
  Baby girl, I didn't mean to shout[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                
  I want me and you to work it out[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                             
  I never wished that I would ever hurt my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                             
  And it's drivin' me crazy, ‘cause I'm so…[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  
Lonely (so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]      
Oh, I'm so lonely)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   
I'm Mr. Lonely (Mr. Lonely)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    
I have nobody (I have nobody)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          
For my own (to call my own, girl)[/tab]
[tab]           ([ch]C[/ch])      
Oh, I'm so lonely[/tab]

             
[Outro]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]  
So lonely (Lonely), so lonely (So lonely)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]         
Mr. Lonely (Lonely), so lonely (So lonely)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]                                      
So lonely (Lonely), so lonely (So lonely)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch] N.C.            
So lonely, Mr. Lonely[/tab]
